Write a short complaint title for this customer review. Keep it concise and focused on the main problem.

Review: I got this specifically to make coconut milk with and was shocked to find out that you need to use ½ cup of powder (6.5 scoops) for 1 cup of coconut milk. In all fairness, it is clearly indicated in the instructions, but I am used to other comparable products that only require 2 tablespoons. The bag is only 40 grams, so it only made a few drinks. I tried lowering the level of powder used, but then it lost all flavor. I tried adding a scoop to coffee and couldn’t distinguish the flavor at all. Overall, I feel it is a bit pricey for what it is.
validation.target_text: Too much powder needed per serving
validation.generated_summary: I don’t think this is a good product

Review: Bought these 3 for the price of 1. Just incase it breaks or I find another washing machine that needs to be fixed as well. --UPDATE October 29, 2021-- 1st set broke just four months later, on the second one now. The build quality on these are not that good. The keyhole was completely stripped out. I wish I still had my originals, the only problem was the rubber insulators was broken, none of the keyholes were damaged and those had probably been on there since it was new.
validation.generated_summary: The keyhole was completely stripped out

Write a short complaint title for this customer review. Keep it concise and focused on the main problem.

Review: I have used this product for the past 3 years in my Peerless 3 section boiler. This is the 4th year I am adding the product according to directions. I use the full bottle. As my photos show, the inside of a Honeywell zone valve and a Taco 007 pump are coated with a black film. I was under the impression this product kept the system clean and lubricated. The little water I drained out of the system when changing the pump and zone valve did not look dirty. Slightly brown. I don't think this is a good boiler cleaner. But I do like the idea of a silicone lubricant kept in the system throughout the year. I have no way of telling how bad the pump and valve would have looked if I had not used the product, or had I used a different product.
validation.target_text: Leaves black film on boiler parts

Review: Sort of big and bulky and not what I was looking for. As other reviewers reported, the buckle on the shoulder strap is uncomfortable--it hits right at the underarm area and hurts even when a t shirt is worn under it. I do have to say it provided good support and did relieve my mid to lower back pain when I tried it on. I'll be returning this as I've found another brace that does the same job with no shoulder restraints.
